required_documents.name: Age Proof
required_documents.description: Birth certificate, 10th standard mark sheet, PAN Card, or Aadhaar.

required_documents.name: Address Proof
required_documents.description: Electricity bill, water bill, Aadhaar, Passport, or Bank Passbook.

required_documents.name: Passport Size Photo
required_documents.description: Recent color photograph with white background.

nri.process: Use Form 6A to register as an overseas elector.

first_time_voter.guidance: Welcome! Make sure to fill Form 6. You can apply if you turn 18 on 1st Jan, 1st Apr, 1st Jul, or 1st Oct.

under_18.info: You can pre-register if you are 17+ years old. Your card will be issued when you turn 18.

address_changed.process: Use Form 8 to shift your constituency or update your address.
